TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kaliyawan, title = Kaliyawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaliyawan} }

S.FORM: Kaliyawan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Kaliyawan a niyaro', 1,751 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 4,493 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 28% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,266 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 72% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,227 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 15%, Bunun 2%, Taya l2%, Truku 6%, Kebalan 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾijawan itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u kaɾijawan a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, taja ɾ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kaliyawan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Kaliyawan a niyaro', 1,751 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 4,493 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 28% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,266 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 72% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,227 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 15%, Bunun 2%, Taya l2%, Truku 6%, Kebalan 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾijawan itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u kaɾijawan a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, taja ɾ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
